name: Mrs. Petterson's Jello Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Jello using the fruit cocktail juice as part of the liquid mixture according to package directions.
2. Once the Jello has started to thicken, mix in the fruit cocktail, marshmallows, and banana slices.
3. Prepare the Dream Whip topping according to package instructions.
4. Gently fold the Dream Whip into the Jello until fully incorporated.
5. Chill the salad in the refrigerator until it is firm.
